name: Historic & Cultural Journeys
description: Private journeys through Ethiopia’s historic north, designed around context rather than checklist sightseeing.

name: Omo Valley & Community Journeys
description: Southern journeys built around time, consent, local interpretation and realistic road planning.

name: Festival & Pilgrimage Journeys
description: Seasonal journeys around Timket, Meskel, Genna and Hidar Tsion, with worship space protected.

name: Photography Expeditions
description: Image-led journeys planned around light, repeat access, consent, vehicle position and field logistics.

name: Trekking & Active Journeys
description: Supported highland treks and remote journeys designed around terrain, season, altitude and honest comfort.

name: Birdwatching Journeys
description: Habitat-led birding journeys for endemic-rich highlands, Rift lakes, southern drylands and forests.

name: Wildlife Expeditions
description: Specialist journeys for endemic mammals, rare habitats and remote conservation landscapes.

name: Special-Interest Journeys
description: Purpose-built journeys for coffee, archaeology, geology, professional and academic interests.

name: Addis Ababa Day Tours
description: Private half-day, full-day and stopover programs shaped around traffic, flight times and traveler energy.
